tool_args.label: Recommendation #1A: Special bus phase at 2nd Ave & 60th St
tool_args.raw_text: Solution: special bus phase to allow for turn. Benefit: Reduced risk of bus collisions

payload.description: Special bus phase to allow Q60 turn at Second Avenue and 60th Street

tool_args.label: Recommendation #1B: Reconfigure 60th Street bus lanes
tool_args.raw_text: Solution: Reconfigure 60th Street to provide 2 WB bus lanes and stops (Q60 & Q101)

payload.description: Reconfigure 60th Street to provide 2 westbound bus lanes and stops for Q60 and Q101

tool_args.label: Recommendation #2: Leading Pedestrian Interval at 3rd Ave & 57th St
tool_args.raw_text: Leading Pedestrian Interval an opportunity for EB bus signal priority

payload.description: Leading Pedestrian Interval providing opportunity for eastbound bus signal priority at Third Avenue and 57th Street

tool_args.label: Recommendation #3: Leading Pedestrian Interval at Queens Plaza North & Crescent St
tool_args.raw_text: Solution: Provide 10-sec. Leading Pedestrian Interval for ped/bikeway crossing. Benefit: Improve safety & reduce bus/pedestrian conflicts

payload.description: 10-second Leading Pedestrian Interval for pedestrian/bikeway crossing at Queens Plaza North and Crescent Street
